scripts.build:wasm: cd .. && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p part-registry-wasm --release && "${WASM_BINDGEN:-$HOME/.cargo/bin/wasm-bindgen}" --target web --out-dir web/src/wasm --out-name part_registry_wasm target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/part_registry_wasm.wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:fe
